subcodes.title: Words recorded by Miss Boylan spoken around 1911-08-25
subcodes.first_line: Tell them a Bahá'í is a person who is free from all prejudices - racial prejudice, religious prejudices... A Bahá'í is one in whom the human perfections are active.
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @race unity; racial issues, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
